zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Pakenham於1278年出生在英國素福爾可帕克南時，他的父親William I de Pakenham28歲，母親Joan de Morin23歲。他於1305年與Rohesia Valognes在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1332年1月27日在英國英格蘭素福爾可易沃斯 索普享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Pakenham于1278年出生在英国素福爾可帕克南时，他的父亲William I de Pakenham28岁，母亲Joan de Morin23岁。他于1305年与Rohesia Valognes在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1332年1月27日在英国英格兰素福爾可易沃斯 索普享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pakenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pakenham (Suffolk). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Pacca (genitive Paccan) + hām ‘village, homestead’.
History: A family of this name has been established in Westmeath, Ireland, since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Pakenham was born in 1278, in Pakenham, Suffolk, England, his father, William I de Pakenham, was 28 and his mother, Joan de Morin, was 23. He married Rohesia Valognes in 1305, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 27 January 1332, in Ixworth Thorpe, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Pakenham est né en 1278, à Pakenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William I de Pakenham, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan de Morin, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Rohesia Valognes en 1305, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 27 janvier 1332, à Ixworth Thorpe, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Pakenham 1278 in Pakenham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William I de Pakenham 28 und seine Mutter Joan de Morin 23. Er hat 1305 in England, United Kingdom Rohesia Valognes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 27. Januar 1332 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Ixworth Thorpe, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Pakenham è nato il nel 1278 nel Pakenham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William I de Pakenham, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Morin, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Rohesia Valognes nel 1305, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 27 gennaio 1332, nel Ixworth Thorpe, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ko.Cley next the Sea, Norfolk, England: 영국 노르폴크 클리 니스트 테 시
ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Pakenham(이)가 1278년 영국 수폴크 팍함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William I de Pakenham(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Morin(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1305년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Rohesia Valognes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1332년 1월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이스워스 소에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Pakenham nasceu em 1278, em Pakenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William I de Pakenham, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Morin, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Rohesia Valognes em 1305, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1332, em Ixworth Thorpe, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.Cley next the Sea, Norfolk, England: кли некст т сеа, норфолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Pakenham родился в 1278 г. в местности пеикенам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William I de Pakenham было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Morin, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Rohesia Valognes в 1305 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 27 января 1332 г. в местности иксворт таурп, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

Se casó con Rohesia Valognes en 1305, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió el 27 de enero de 1332, en Ixworth Thorpe, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
